channel.title: Penobscot County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Not to be confused with maineprobate.net, the shared statewide filings-search portal — this is the county's own page. Links probate forms, statutory will, and notice-to-creditors resources.

item.title: Monitoring started: Penobscot County Probate Court
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
